name: scroll-world
description: Immersive scroll-scrubbed 'fly through the world' landing pages, generated from scene stills + depth maps with a WebGL parallax shader (no video).

plugins.name: scroll-world
plugins.description: Build an immersive scroll-scrubbed landing page where a depth-driven 2.5D camera pushes from outside each scene into its interior, then crossfades to the next with no cuts. Interviews the user for topic, story beats, and brand kit; generates cohesive stills + depth maps; wires a portable, framework-agnostic WebGL scrub engine.
